observed_meaning: low-risk recommendation / trusted enough to buy without much checking
notes: Check whether it is genuine trust or copied seeding language

observed_meaning: being influenced or persuaded by content
notes: Can be positive, skeptical, or ironic

observed_meaning: deciding not to buy after research or bad experience

notes: Strong signal when tied to product reason

observed_meaning: strong immediate attraction or addictive interest
notes: Can indicate appeal without durable trust

observed_meaning: warning others to avoid a product or claim
notes: Map to barrier or risk depending on quote

observed_meaning: pressure, guilt, or manipulation in communication
notes: Use carefully; often marks anti-pressure sentiment
